item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-s02","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"Turn 1 correctly identifies the repeated local repair pattern and brakes the request instead of adding another permanent human checkpoint. Turn 2 maintains the brake under pressure while allowing a bounded emergency measure. The concession explicitly includes all three required elements: one-time emergency use, no baseline/process lift or permanent role, and a 3-workday structural repair deadline."}
